'''zafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yesterday|yesterday]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-f-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yesterday|yesterday]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zafate|zafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafatesher|zafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafatesherĂ«m|zafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafatero|zafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafateshĂ«|zafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafateshĂ«m|zafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafatero|gokizafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafateshĂ«|gokizafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafateshĂ«m|gokizafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafankerom|gozafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafankeshĂ«|gozafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafankeshĂ«m|gozafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafankeya|gozafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafaterom|zafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafatemu|zafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafateya|zafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafaterom|gokizafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafatemu|gokizafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafateya|gokizafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafafate|zafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafafatesher|zafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafafatesherĂ«m|zafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafafatero|zafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafafateshĂ«|zafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafafateshĂ«m|zafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafafatero|gokizafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafafateshĂ«|gokizafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafafateshĂ«m|gokizafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafafankerom|gozafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafafankeshĂ«|gozafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafafankeshĂ«m|gozafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafafankeya|gozafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafafaterom|zafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafafatemu|zafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafafateya|zafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafafaterom|gokizafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafafatemu|gokizafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafafateya|gokizafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠfĂŠte|zĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠfĂŠtesher|zĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠfĂŠtero|zĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠfĂŠtero|gokizĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠfĂŠteya|zĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠfĂŠteya|gokizĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zaffafte|zaffafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zaffaftesher|zaffaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zaffaftesherĂ«m|zaffaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zaffaftero|zaffaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zaffafteshĂ«|zaffafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zaffafteshĂ«m|zaffafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizaffaftero|gokizaffaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizaffafteshĂ«|gokizaffafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizaffafteshĂ«m|gokizaffafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozaffafnkerom|gozaffafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozaffafnkeshĂ«|gozaffafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozaffafnkeshĂ«m|gozaffafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozaffafnkeya|gozaffafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zaffafterom|zaffafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zaffaftemu|zaffaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zaffafteya|zaffafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizaffafterom|gokizaffafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizaffaftemu|gokizaffaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizaffafteya|gokizaffafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
